__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Lion-dogs Statue,Azoth,Rashomon,The Goodbye Kiss,Mischief Map,Kilby's IC
|rank=purple
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 30 Divine Order Chests opened: Snail ATK +10; Divine Order Chests Opened: 1500/1500
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Divine Order Chests]]
